CVE-2018-11468.title: The __mkd_trim_line function in mkdio.c in libmarkdown.a in DISCO ...
CVE-2018-11468.description: The __mkd_trim_line function in mkdio.c in libmarkdown.a in DISCOUNT 2.2.3a allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (heap-based buffer over-read) via a crafted file, as demonstrated by mkd2html.
